generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values national security, I'm glad to see our leaders taking proactive steps to expand domestic security powers. The recent attacks show we can't afford to be complacent. It's not about giving up liberties - it's about having the tools to stop threats before they happen. My neighbor, a veteran, told me he supports this too. We need to trust our institutions to keep us safe.
